title: Kot Mumin heat wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Kot Mumin with a Z-Score of +5.11. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Kot Mumin is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 16.9 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 37%, which is relatively low, and the wind speed is 3.1 km/h, which is very low. 
 The Heat Wave is expected to continue, with no Heating Degree Days (HDD) recorded, indicating no relief from the heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave in Kot Mumin immediately.
